title: Email Extractor
description: Given 'Name: Alice, Email: alice@example.com; Name: Bob, Email: bob@test.com', extract all email addresses.
starterCode:
data = "Name: Alice, Email: alice@example.com; Name: Bob, Email: bob@test.com"

# Extract and print emails
solution:
data = "Name: Alice, Email: alice@example.com; Name: Bob, Email: bob@test.com"
entries = data.split("; ")
for entry in entries:
    parts = entry.split(", ")
    email = parts[1].split(": ")[1]
    print(email)
